zh.lifeSummary: 當John Allyn Esq. of Hatfield Peverel於1538年8月7日出生在英國艾可塔可泰德時，他的父親John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted31歲，母親Margaret Leigh of Walton22歲。他於大約1553年與Lady Elizabeth Margaret Alabaster在英國艾可塔可泰德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1572年12月1日在英國英格蘭艾可享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可哈特菲爾德 培維勒爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Allyn Esq. of Hatfield Peverel于1538年8月7日出生在英国艾可塔可泰德时，他的父亲John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted31岁，母亲Margaret Leigh of Walton22岁。他于大约1553年与Lady Elizabeth Margaret Alabaster在英国艾可塔可泰德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1572年12月1日在英国英格兰艾可享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可哈特菲爾德 培維勒爾。

nameMeanings.name: Allyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Allen  . This surname is very rare in Britain.
History: Matthew Allyn was one of the founders of Hartford, CT, in 1635 (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker).

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Allyn Esq. of Hatfield Peverel was born on 7 August 1538, in Thaxted, Essex, England, his father, John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Leigh of Walton, was 22. He married Lady Elizabeth Margaret Alabaster about 1553, in Thaxted, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 December 1572, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34, and was buried in Hatfield Peverel, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Allyn Esq. of Hatfield Peverel est né le 7 août 1538, à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Leigh of Walton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Margaret Alabaster environ 1553, à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 décembre 1572, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Hatfield Peverel, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Allyn Esq. of Hatfield Peverel am 7. August 1538 in Thaxted, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Leigh of Walton 22. Er hat um 1553 in Thaxted, Essex, England Lady Elizabeth Margaret Alabaster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Dezember 1572 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hatfield Peverel, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John Allyn Esq. of Hatfield Peverelが1538年8月7日にイギリスエセックスサクステドで生まれた時，父John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxtedは31歳，母Margaret Leigh of Waltonは22歳であった。約1553年にイギリスエセックスサクステドでLady Elizabeth Margaret Alabasterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1572年12月1日にイギリスイギリスエセックスで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスハトフィールド ペバーエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Allyn Esq. of Hatfield Peverel(이)가 1538년 8월 7일 영국 에세스 스액테드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Leigh of Walton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1553년 영국 에세스 스액테드에서 Lady Elizabeth Margaret Alabaster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1572년 12월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 하트필드 p에버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Allyn Esq. of Hatfield Peverel nasceu em 7 de agosto de 1538, em Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Leigh of Walton, tinha 22 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Allyn Esq. of Hatfield Peverel родился 7 августа 1538 г. в местности такстед, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Leigh of Walton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Margaret Alabaster около 1553 г. в местности такстед, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 декабря 1572 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности хатфиелд пивирэл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
